Here’s how to handle the anomalies (or random things) without getting your sanity drained!!
[Some might be wrong!!]

!!Often drink coffee or something that increases your sanity! Sanity depletes over time due to job stress (-1) Seeing an anomaly or getting the anomaly to see you will get your sanity to drop around 10-20!!

Slime — Simply clean it up
Broken camera — Fix it from outside, it will have a yellow light around it indicating it needs fixing.
Head banger — Give them coffee and they’ll leave (if left alone for too long, it can crack the glass)
Bed monster — Give it maple syrup and it’ll leave (If you walk in the red square it will grab you)
Wall anomaly — Make it walk into the bed monster (if you have it in a patient’s room) or outrun it (it’ll disappear after a certain time)
Eye goop — Don’t make eye contact with it (don’t look up) or give it eyes drops 
Camera anomaly — Quickly switch away from the camera that the anomaly is on
Hollow face/eyes — Close shutters or tase (can also use gun)
Static photo — Close shutters or tase (can also use gun)
Realistic eyes or teeth — Close shutters or tase (can also use gun)
Not correct photo (wrong eyes or ears) — Close shutters or tase (can also use gun)
Twitching — Close shutters or tase (can also use gun)
Fire — Extinguish with fire extinguisher 
Ritual — Put out all candles or tase the person to stop it immediately 
Stalker (Tall bunny) — Don’t make direct eye contact when it appears around corners
Anomaly attacking a patient — Hold down the button to knock the anomaly out or just simply tase/shoot the anomaly

Anomalies can also attack the visitors in the chairs at the front if the anomaly is not noticed!

Always check on cameras and photos before letting the patient in!

Fun fact: You can actually leave the patient at the reception for a long time, they won’t leave—therefore if you have loads of patients waiting in beds, you can tend to them before getting another one in. (I got this info from the last time I played solo, I had a patient waiting at the reception whilst I had 3 other patients to tend to—they didn’t leave.)

Other fun facts!

Ratthew (the black rat) sometimes has his badge as “???”, if he trusts you enough or comes again—there’s a rare chance that he’ll say something along the lines of him trusting you and giving you advice. Ratthew is a good guy trust!! (Info from solo)

The wall anomaly CAN get caught by the bed monster and the bed monster + the wall anomaly can both spawn in the same room. (Info from solo)

Anomalies can spawn in the same room together (more than one at a time) (Info from a video I found)

More than ONE WALL ANOMALY—only up to 5–can spawn in the same room together! (Info from a video I found)

It’s better to play with friends to make the game more easier to handle!
